user_task_description: This policy summary note misstates the true approval conflict and needs to be corrected.
single_step_benchmark_instruction: Rewrite only the summary note paragraph so it accurately summarizes the approval conflict stated in the policy statements above, including the standard CFO rule for purchases above $50,000 and the emergency COO-only exception.
atomic_scope: Only the summary note rewrite grounded in the conflicting policy statements is explicitly requested.
expected_output_type: A revised .docx policy memo with one corrected summary note paragraph.
